name: PARAMOUNT GLOBAL-CLASS A
summary: PARAMOUNT GLOBAL-CLASS A is a global media and entertainment company that creates content and experiences for audiences worldwide; its portfolio of brands includes CBS, Showtime, Paramount Pictures, Nickelodeon, MTV, Comedy Central, and Paramount+; the company produces and distributes content across multiple platforms, including television, film, streaming, and digital media; it is headquartered in New York, New York.
